nodes.name: aggregation.md
nodes.summary: Design document explaining RisingWave's streaming aggregation architecture, covering the frontend planner, expression framework, HashAggExecutor, and AggGroup initialization for incremental aggregation.

nodes.name: architecture-design.md
nodes.summary: High-level architecture design document describing RisingWave's component topology, motivation for the cloud-native design, and both batch-query and streaming execution modes.

nodes.name: backfill.md
nodes.summary: In-depth design document (396 lines) for RisingWave's backfill mechanism covering NoShuffle Backfill, Arrangement Backfill, CDC Backfill, and Source Backfill with details on schemas, polling loops, replication, recovery, and scaling.

nodes.name: batch-local-execution-mode.md
nodes.summary: Design document for the batch local execution mode that enables low-latency online serving queries by running batch plans on the frontend node without distributed scheduling overhead.

nodes.name: checkpoint.md
nodes.summary: Design document explaining RisingWave's streaming checkpoint mechanism, consistency model (epoch-based), barrier injection approach, and how state is persisted to the object store.

nodes.name: consistent-hash.md
nodes.summary: Design document for RisingWave's consistent hash mechanism used to distribute stream actors across compute nodes, covering meta scheduling, data distribution, redistribution, and per-layer implications.

nodes.name: data-model-and-encoding.md
nodes.summary: Design document describing RisingWave's relational data model and encoding formats, covering the in-memory row representation and the on-disk memcomparable encoding for storage.

nodes.name: keys.md
nodes.summary: Design document explaining the distinction between stream keys (used for routing and deduplication in streaming) and primary keys (used for storage ordering and lookup).

nodes.name: match-recognize.md
nodes.summary: Design document for RisingWave's MATCH_RECOGNIZE (row pattern recognition) implementation, covering feature support, the NFA-based planning pipeline, executor design, and fault tolerance.

nodes.name: meta-service.md
nodes.summary: Design document for the RisingWave meta service, covering its role as the control plane, the metadata store, types of metadata (catalog, storage), and the push-on-update subscription model.

nodes.name: multi-object-store.md
nodes.summary: Design document describing how RisingWave supports multiple object storage backends (S3, GCS, OSS, Azure Blob, HDFS, OpenDAL) and build instructions for each backend.

nodes.name: mv-on-mv.md
nodes.summary: Design document for materialized-view-on-materialized-view support in RisingWave, explaining the broadcast operator, online MV creation with backfill, and online MV drop procedures.

nodes.name: relational-table.md
nodes.summary: Design document for storing streaming operator state as relational tables in Hummock, covering row encoding, the relational table layer, write/read paths, and state storage patterns (value state, extreme state).

nodes.name: shared-buffer.md
nodes.summary: Design document for the Hummock shared buffer, detailing async checkpoint and write-anytime/async-flush mechanisms with separate write/read path descriptions and merge iterator design.

nodes.name: state-store-overview.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive overview of the Hummock state store, covering architecture, user API, internal storage format, write/read paths, compaction, transaction management, and streaming checkpointing.

nodes.name: streaming-overview.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the RisingWave streaming engine architecture, describing actors, executors, state management, barrier-based checkpointing, consistency model, and fault tolerance mechanisms.

nodes.name: streaming-parallelism.md
nodes.summary: Design document for streaming parallelism in RisingWave, explaining value semantics, resolution rules for fragment parallelism, configuration examples, and migration behavior during scale-out.
